title: limonium proliferum
intro: Limonium proliferum, also known as sea lavender, is a perennial flowering plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found in coastal areas. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limonium proliferum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Limonium proliferum is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
